candidates.why: Primary operating revenue line; matches top-line sales concept and has large values consistent with total revenue.
Represents ancillary operating revenue, but not the main top-line; kept as candidate but secondary to 'Operating revenues'.

variables.notes: Using the main operating revenue line as the top-line revenue measure.

candidates.why: Direct production/input costs; best match for cost of goods sold.
Appears to be an aggregate of multiple operating cost lines, not strictly COGS, so less appropriate.

variables.notes: Cost of Materials is treated as cost of goods sold / direct production costs.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A component (stock-based compensation within SG&A).
Likely overhead/other operating expenses; fits SG&A-type costs and is not labeled as a total.
Appears to be an aggregate total for several operating cost lines including COGS and D&A; excluded per rule to avoid totals.
This is revenue, not an SG&A expense; excluded.

variables.notes: Selected explicit SG&A-related components and excluded the aggregate 'Operating expenses' total and revenue items.

candidates.why: Explicit current-period R&D expense line; matches XRD definition.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current R&D expense; secondary if direct R&D were missing.

variables.notes: Using the explicit R&D expense line; amortization of capitalized R&D is excluded from XRD.

candidates.why: Primary interest expense line; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; useful as a backup label in case main interest expense is missing for some years.
Net financial result including interest and other items; kept in mind but not chosen because a pure interest expense line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provided a priority list with the main interest expense first and lease-interest supplemental line second.

candidates.why: Represents equity attributable to owners of the parent (separate from non-controlling interests); ideal for BE per instructions.
'Equity' includes both Group equity and Non-controlling interests; would double count MIB if used.
Represents total assets/liabilities, not equity attributable to owners; not appropriate.

variables.notes: Using Group equity as owner/parent equity, which excludes non-controlling interests that are mapped separately to MIB.

candidates.why: Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary choice for minority interest (MIB).
Alternative label for the same concept; useful for older periods or label changes.
Income statement flow of minority interests, not the balance sheet stock; less appropriate for BE+MIB denominator.

variables.notes: Mapped to balance sheet non-controlling/minority interest lines to capture the equity component of MIB.
